captions.formal: This time-lapse footage presents a high-angle view of a multi-lane urban intersection with heavy vehicle traffic, framed by tall residential buildings and yellow ginkgo trees under clear daylight conditions.
captions.sarcastic: It is truly inspiring to watch thousands of commuters rush past the Korea Tectes Engineering building with such urgent, blurred efficiency.
captions.humorous_tech: The traffic flow looks like a successful deployment where every car merged without a single conflict, though the motion blur suggests the render time was set to maximum speed.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The yellow ginkgo trees are trying their best to provide a scenic autumn backdrop, but the cars are moving so fast they barely notice the pretty leaves.

captions.formal: A small ginger kitten walks forward from a shaded area of dirt and green foliage toward a low-angle camera lens during the daytime.
captions.sarcastic: The ginger kitten demonstrates breathtaking bravery by walking three feet across some dirt while maintaining intense eye contact.
captions.humorous_tech: The ginger kitten initiates a physical proximity scan, walking steadily toward the lens to debug the connection with its large, unblinking eyes.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This ginger kitten has spotted you and is walking over to demand the tribute of treats it believes you are hiding in your pockets.

captions.formal: A Black woman wearing an orange top and light-colored jacket types on a keyboard at a white desk in a modern office setting.
captions.sarcastic: She demonstrates the thrilling ability to look at a screen and press keys without falling out of her black office chair.
captions.humorous_tech: Her fingers are flying across the keyboard, likely trying to push a hotfix to production before the silver all-in-one computer decides to update itself.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She is typing with the intense focus of someone who just remembered they left the oven on, or perhaps just trying to finish before lunch.
